rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.552, which establishes the Teach for Texas Pilot Program under the State Board for Educator Certification. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 21.552. PROGRAM ESTABLISHED. The State Board for Educator Certification by rule shall establish the Teach for Texas Pilot Program consistent with the purposes provided by Section 21.551.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns educator certification pilot program, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
